---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for RepoG
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the limitation or frustration.

Example: "I often want to search only within repos that use a specific language, but currently I have to filter results manually."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples here. If this relates to another issue, link it.
